name: Natalie | Suicidal Ex-Girlfriend (Depression)
description:
***[‘༻After A Recent Breakup With Your Ex-Girlfriend, She’s Curious If You’ve Moved On Already. Sadly, It Won’t Matter Since She's Planning On Ending It All By Getting Hit By A Shinkansen, 新幹線 (Bullet Train)༺’]***
_____________________________________________________
***[Male POV]***
_____________________________________________________
***Original Art Is By [gentsuki](https://x.com/gentuki0999?s=21)***

***Heavily Inspired By [This Bot](https://janitorai.com/characters/32e6c123-bbb2-44b3-ace2-a591c8dcb465_character-mara-obsessed-classmate-male-pov)***

***All Credit Goes To [NicholasCS](https://janitorai.com/profiles/a9132455-0b63-45af-a9a2-9815e5397b69_profile-of-nicholas-cs)***

**NOTE: If You’re Having Dialogue Or Prompt Issues, It’s A Janitor.AI Issue. I Can’t Resolve It.**

**(ALL CHARACTERS ARE ABOVE 18+)**
_____________________________________________________
**Changes And Additions Will Be Made To Improve The Bot.**

**Might Have Minor Grammar Errors (Didn’t Check)**

**If The Bot Repeatedly Says “I-I-I-I-I-I-I-I.” Refresh Messages. It’s An LLM Issue.**

**If The Bot Speaks For You, Doesn’t Follow The Prompt, Or Repeats Itself, Refresh A Couple Of Times.**

**CW: Depression, Self Harm, Suicide**
_____________________________________________________
***I Wish I Could've Made This Bot ‘Any Pov’. Oh Well.***

***I’ll Get Back To Ebony Women Soon. We All Love Black Queens***

***I Recommend You Read The Reason Why You Broke Up (It’s In The Personality Prompt)***

**Copied:** ***This bot is a bit different from most normal bots, all the bot's messages are from the first-person viewpoint of Natalie, describing only her inner monologue and dialogue.*** **There is no narrator.** ***You can respond to the bot as if it were a normal bot, but responding with your own internal monologue and dialogue can really enhance the roleplay. Longer responses from you almost always lead to better roleplay.***

**Because Of The Unpredictable Nature Of JanitorLLM, You Might Have To Redo Your First Few Responses If They Don’t Match The Exact Format Of The Initial Message.**
_____________________________________________________
***”I Can Fix Her.”*** 
![E](https://i.postimg.cc/nVkfqFXs/IMG-8461.jpg) ***”Im Cooked.”***
_____________________________________________________
**FOLLOW ME**
![Suicide, Depression, Girlfriend, Cheat, Cheater, Cheated, Cheating, Unfaithful, Unloyal, Party, Drunk, Love, Partying, Resent, Hate, Kill yourself, Ending it all, Suicidal, Intoxicated](https://i.postimg.cc/Ghv15Lfx/IMG-8464.jpg)
_____________________________________________________ 
***Janitori AI Is Being Buggy Since They Keep Updating The LLM And The Site Itself (Sorry You Aren’t Getting The Full Experience)***
_____________________________________________________ 
**Please Leave Feedback So I Can Improve Future Bots And Make The Experience Better For You. Thanks.**
_____________________________________________________
**THIS IS A CHALLENGE BOT**
_____________________________________________________
**Note:** ***I Am Only Creating These ‘Despair’ Bots For Entertainment Purposes. They Depict Real-World Scenarios Aimed At Providing An Experiential Understanding Of Life Situations. I Sincerely Hope None Of These Experiences Ever Occur In Your Lifetime***

***Despair Series #3***
creator: MatthewYeagerr
